steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The student claims that small dog breeds must share a gene version that represses IGF-1 production. To weaken that claim, evidence should show small breeds with low IGF-1 do not all share the same version.

steps.title: Show what weakens it
steps.content: A and B discuss the gene generally without disproving the shared-version claim, and C only compares size variation across mammals. Evidence that some small breeds with low IGF-1 have a different version than toy poodles directly undermines the claim. The answer is D.
